languages.text: "Разрешите представиться: Кантус Зехир отто Толиман, офицер вокс-ретранслятора ЛМXIV шестой верхней палубы второго сектора. Юноша со мной — мой старший сын. Здесь у нас серьезное дело, и мы будем крайне признательны Вашей Светлости, если вы изволите посодействовать исполнению нашего справедливое требования к персоналу сектора Бионика".

"Allow us to introduce ourselves: Kantus Zehir Otto Toliman, officer of Vox-Repeater LMXIV on Upper Deck 6, Sector 2. And this young man is my eldest son. We are here on a serious matter, and we would be most grateful to Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} if you would lend your support to our fair petition for the staff of the Sector Bionica."
languages.original_text: "Разрешите представиться: Кантус Зехир отто Толиман, офицер вокс-ретранслятора ЛМXIV шестой верхней палубы второго сектора. Юноша со мной — мой старший сын. Здесь у нас серьезное дело, и мы будем крайне признательны Вашей Светлости, если вы изволите посодействовать исполнению нашего справедливое требования к персоналу сектора Бионика".

languages.text: 「我々を御紹介しましょう。ヴォックス・リピーターLMXIVの官吏、カントゥス・ゼヒル・オット・トリーマンです。上甲板6区です。そしてこの若者は、私の長男です。我々は重要な件でここに参りました。セクター・ビオニカの職員に対する我々の正当な訴えに、御支援を賜りたく存じます」
languages.original_text: "Allow us to introduce ourselves: Kantus Zehir Otto Toliman, officer of Vox-Repeater LMXIV on Upper Deck 6, Sector 2. And this young man is my eldest son. We are here on a serious matter, and we would be most grateful to Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} if you would lend your support to our fair petition for the staff of the Sector Bionica."

languages.text: "Kendimizi tanıtmamıza izin verin: 2. Sektör, 6. Güverte'deki Voks Yineleyici LMXIV'ten subay Kantus Zehir Otto Toliman. Bu genç adam da büyük oğlum. Ciddi bir mesele için buradayız, Sektör Biyonika personeline yönelik haklı dilekçemize destek verirseniz minnettar oluruz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri."
languages.original_text: "Allow us to introduce ourselves: Kantus Zehir Otto Toliman, officer of Vox-Repeater LMXIV on Upper Deck 6, Sector 2. And this young man is my eldest son. We are here on a serious matter, and we would be most grateful to Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} if you would lend your support to our fair petition for the staff of the Sector Bionica."

Ciddi bir mesele için buradayız, Sektör Biyonika personeline yönelik haklı dilekçemize destek verirseniz minnettar oluruz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri."

languages.text: “请容我们自我介绍：坎图斯·泽希尔·奥托·托里曼，第2区第6号上层甲板LMXIV型音阵军官。这位年轻人是我的长子。我们此行事关重大，若大人能支持我们对仿生区工作人员提出的正当请愿，我们将不胜感激。”
languages.original_text: "Allow us to introduce ourselves: Kantus Zehir Otto Toliman, officer of Vox-Repeater LMXIV on Upper Deck 6, Sector 2. And this young man is my eldest son. We are here on a serious matter, and we would be most grateful to Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} if you would lend your support to our fair petition for the staff of the Sector Bionica."

traits.locale_text: “请容我们自我介绍：坎图斯·泽希尔·奥托·托里曼，第2区第6号上层甲板LMXIV型音阵军官。这位年轻人是我的长子。我们此行事关重大，若大人能支持我们对仿生区工作人员提出的正当请愿，我们将不胜感激。”

languages.text: "Ich darf uns kurz vorstellen: Kantus Zehir Otto Toliman, Offizier von Vox-Repeater LMXIV auf Oberdeck 6, Sektor 2. Und dieser junge Mann ist mein ältester Sohn. Wir sind wegen einer ernsten Angelegenheit hier und wären Eurer {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft} ausgesprochen dankbar, wenn Ihr uns hinsichtlich unserer bescheidenen Petition für die Mitarbeiter von Sektor Bionica unterstützen würdet."
languages.original_text: "Allow us to introduce ourselves: Kantus Zehir Otto Toliman, officer of Vox-Repeater LMXIV on Upper Deck 6, Sector 2. And this young man is my eldest son. We are here on a serious matter, and we would be most grateful to Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} if you would lend your support to our fair petition for the staff of the Sector Bionica."

traits.locale_text: "Ich darf uns kurz vorstellen: Kantus Zehir Otto Toliman, Offizier von Vox-Repeater LMXIV auf Oberdeck 6, Sektor 2. Und dieser junge Mann ist mein ältester Sohn. Wir sind wegen einer ernsten Angelegenheit hier und wären Eurer {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft} ausgesprochen dankbar, wenn Ihr uns hinsichtlich unserer bescheidenen Petition für die Mitarbeiter von Sektor Bionica unterstützen würdet."

languages.text: « Permettez que nous nous présentions : Kantus Zehir Otto Toliman, officier du répéteur-vox LMXIV affecté au pont supérieur 6, secteur 2. Quant à ce jeune homme, il s'agit de mon fils aîné. L'affaire qui nous amène est de la plus haute importance, et nous serions infiniment reconnaissants à Votre Seigneurie de bien vouloir appuyer notre juste requête auprès du personnel du secteur Bionica. »
languages.original_text: "Allow us to introduce ourselves: Kantus Zehir Otto Toliman, officer of Vox-Repeater LMXIV on Upper Deck 6, Sector 2. And this young man is my eldest son. We are here on a serious matter, and we would be most grateful to Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} if you would lend your support to our fair petition for the staff of the Sector Bionica."

Quant à ce jeune homme, il s'agit de mon fils aîné. L'affaire qui nous amène est de la plus haute importance, et nous serions infiniment reconnaissants à Votre Seigneurie de bien vouloir appuyer notre juste requête auprès du personnel du secteur Bionica. »

languages.text: «Permítanos presentarnos: Kantus Zehir Otto Toliman, oficial del voco repetidor LMXIV de la cubierta superior 6, sector 2. El joven que me acompaña es mi hijo mayor. Venimos por un asunto serio y agradeceríamos que mi{mf|lord|lady} intercediera por nosotros en nuestra más que razonable petición al personal del Sector Bionica».
